    1. call(Arena)

Interface ForeignFunctions.ArenaBooleanCallable

Enclosing class:
ForeignFunctions
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public static interface ForeignFunctions.ArenaBooleanCallable
Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns a boolean.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    call(Arena arena)
    Executes this operation with the provided arena.

  • Method Details

    • call

      boolean call(Arena arena) throws Throwable
      Executes this operation with the provided arena.
      Parameters:
      arena - the confined arena scoped to this operation
      Returns:
      the operation result
      Throws:
      Throwable - if the operation fails
